title: The Other 10%
description: Pa questions ChatGPT's confidence score after discovering that the suspected bobcat is standing right behind him.
alt: Pa sits in an Adirondack chair by the river looking at his phone, which says '90% certainty: Bobcat.' He thinks, 'Hmm. What's the other 10%?' Several bobcat paw prints are visible in the dirt near his chair. A real bobcat stands in the field above him while Grandma whistles and waves from far away near a white Cape-style house.
